overall_description: A mutex implementation with a wait queue that allows threads to block until the mutex becomes available. Provides try-lock and lock operations, with proper unlocking when guards are dropped.

constants.name: INITIAL_LOCK_STATE
constants.description: Initial value of the lock (false) represented as integer

variables.name: lock
variables.description: Atomic boolean representing mutex lock state (0 = unlocked, 1 = locked)

variables.name: wait_queue
variables.description: Queue of waiting threads blocked on this mutex

processes.name: MutexAcquirer
processes.description: Thread attempting to acquire the mutex

assertions.description: Ensures a waiting thread will eventually acquire the lock
Guarantees that if a thread is waiting, the lock will eventually be released

translation_notes: WaitQueue's internal state is abstracted as an array of threads
MutexGuard's drop implementation is modeled as implicit release action
AtomicBool's compare_exchange is simplified to boolean state transitions
